files_touched.reason: Add exact-named acceptance test TestCompactNormalTruncateThenAppendThenCompactAgain required by issue #49's test spec.

indirect: engine/graph consumers (agents/query, agents/ingestion) are unaffected: no production code changes in this run.

risk_if_wrong: Low for this run's own diff (test-only). The underlying data-loss bug itself (if it had still been present) would be CRITICAL: silent, permanent loss of any edge appended to a node after that node's first successful compaction+truncation, on the very next ordinary Compact -- no crash or failure injection needed. Confirmed via full read of engine/graph/compact.go and engine/graph/edgelog.go that this was already fixed by commit ed57468 prior to this run's HEAD.

dependencies.engine/wal.OpenWriter/latestSegmentNum: already honors the segment-floor marker on next open

test_plan_impact: Adds one new top-level test function; no existing test modified or removed. Full engine/graph and engine test suites re-run with -race as self-consistency gate.
